list_finalized_basis: Filing deadline was February 24, 2026, plus statutory cure period through ~March 11, 2026. Today is May 13, 2026 — both windows are well past. Marc Lande's December 12, 2025 withdrawal is an SBE-listed status update against a closed list, not a new filing. Treat the list as finalized for episode-planning purposes.
